title: Craft beer.
Local food.
Community.
hero.sub: 9+ rotating taps of local craft beer and a different food truck almost every day, poured over a 17-foot ash wood bar two blocks from the water.

about.body: Sharp Park Taproom was opened by Pacifica locals Kris Romo and Alex Englund with one goal: skip the big distributors and pour what local breweries are actually making, in a room built for hanging out. The mural behind the bar is hand-painted by Kris. The bar itself is 17 feet of ash wood. The dogs are welcome on the patio, the board games are out, and the game's usually on.
